title: Leak Finder Automatizado com Spots de Estudo Priorizados
plan: Create src/analyzers/leak_finder.py with Leak dataclass and LeakFinder class containing leak detection methods for preflop, postflop, positional, and sizing categories
Implement cost estimation in bb/100 using deviation from healthy ranges and weight factors for each stat
Implement health score calculation (0-100) based on aggregate leak severity
Implement period comparison logic (last 30 days vs overall) using existing repository date filtering
Implement study spot generation with concrete action suggestions per leak type
Create comprehensive test suite in tests/test_leak_finder.py (60-80 tests covering unit, integration, and edge cases)
Integrate LeakFinder into src/analyzers/cash.py to expose leak data through existing analyzer pipeline
Add HTML rendering section in src/reports/cash_report.py with top 5 leaks, study spots, health score bar, and period comparison table
Update main.py if CLI leak-finder subcommand is needed
Run full test suite and quality gates
